doc.hole: The Semu-owned 1065x1477 product render has one continuous charcoal lens. Declarative aperture pixels are 594x534.6 at (258,260), exactly 10:9. At 1280x800 the contain-fit leaves 321.733x289.560 pixels, selecting centered 320x288 (2x native) content without making raster art the geometry authority.
